title: BEM-846 execute after 845
objective:

"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport','governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt','governance/audit_mailbox/gpt_to_claude','governance/workflow_dispatch_queue']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-22 | 06:06 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}
prev=load('governance/state/bem845_verify_bem843_real_response.json')
ps=prev.get('status','unknown')
if ps=='real_response_found':
    status='protocol_generation_selected'
    next_action='create agreed protocol from real Claude response'
elif ps=='runtime_exists_response_still_missing':
    status='response_writer_failure_recorded'
    # Do not fake Claude response. Create a precise failure dossier and retry request; next step must inspect action outcome.
    dossier=Path('governance/state/bem846_response_writer_failure_dossier.json')
    dossier.write_text(json.dumps({'bem':'BEM-846','problem':'Claude runtime exists but no accepted real response file exists','required_file':'governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt/bem843_claude_real_response.md','runtime_started_at':prev.get('runtime_started_at'),'runtime_completed_at':prev.get('runtime_completed_at'),'claude_outcome':prev.get('claude_outcome'),'created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    q=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem846_response_writer_retry.json')
    q.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v11','workflow':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','workflow_id':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-846 response writer failure retry; runtime exists but real response missing','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    next_action='fresh tick then inspect Claude action outcome and response file writer'
elif ps=='dispatch_result_exists_runtime_missing':
    status='runtime_missing_repair_selected'
    q=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem846_runtime_retry.json')
    q.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v11','workflow':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','workflow_id':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-846 runtime missing retry after dispatch result exists','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    next_action='fresh tick then verify runtime state'
else:
    status='queue_processing_repair_selected'
    next_action='repair queue processing and dispatch result writer'
state={'bem':'BEM-846','status':status,'previous_status':ps,'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem846_execute_after_bem845.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem846_execute_after_bem845.md').write_text('# BEM-846 | Execute After BEM-845 | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem846_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-846'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed=['governance/state/bem846_execute_after_bem845.json','governance/reports/bem846_execute_after_bem845.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem846_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl']
for p in ['governance/state/bem846_response_writer_failure_dossier.json','governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem846_response_writer_retry.json','governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem846_runtime_retry.json']:
    if Path(p).exists(): changed.append(p)
changed_files.extend(changed)
ops_applied.append('Executed the next action after BEM-845: if real response absent despite runtime, recorded response-writer failure and queued retry without faking Claude approval')
